mapper.select:
SELECT inst_oid , INST_NM , brno , rprsv_nm , telno_pfx , telno_mid , telno_sfx , FAX_PFX , FAX_MID , FAX_SFX , zip , ADDR , daddr , REG_ID , REG_DT , mdfcn_id , mdfcn_dt , USE_YN FROM ${schema}.inst
AND inst_oid = #{instOid}
AND INST_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{instNm}, '%')
AND brno LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bizRegNo}, '%')
AND rprsv_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{repNm}, '%')
AND CONCAT(telno_pfx, telno_mid, telno_sfx) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{telNo}, '%')
AND CONCAT(FAX_PFX, FAX_MID, FAX_SFX) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{faxNo}, '%')
AND zip = #{zipCd}
AND ( ADDR LIKE CONCAT('%', #{addr}, '%') OR daddr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{addr}, '%') )
AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT inst_oid , INST_NM , brno , rprsv_nm , telno_pfx , telno_mid , telno_sfx , FAX_PFX , FAX_MID , FAX_SFX , zip , ADDR , daddr , REG_ID , REG_DT , mdfcn_id , mdfcn_dt , USE_YN FROM ${schema}.inst WHERE inst_oid = #{instOid}

SELECT inst_oid , INST_NM , brno , rprsv_nm , telno_pfx , telno_mid , telno_sfx , FAX_PFX , FAX_MID , FAX_SFX , zip , ADDR , daddr , REG_ID , REG_DT , mdfcn_id , mdfcn_dt , USE_YN FROM ${schema}.inst WHERE brno = #{bizRegNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.inst
INST_NM = #{instNm},
brno = #{bizRegNo},
rprsv_nm = #{repNm},
telno_pfx = #{telPfx},
telno_mid = #{telMid},
telno_sfx = #{telSfx},
FAX_PFX = #{faxPfx},
FAX_MID = #{faxMid},
FAX_SFX = #{faxSfx},
zip = #{zipCd},
ADDR = #{addr},
daddr = #{addrDtl},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId},
USE_YN = #{useYn},
mdfcn_dt = now()
WHERE inst_oid = #{instOid}
mapper.delete: UPDATE ${schema}.inst SET mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId} , mdfcn_dt = NOW() , USE_YN = 'N' WHERE inst_oid = #{instOid}
